_description: Canonical tracker and GUI source for Shadow Familiar levels 13-20. Used by tracker_sync.py and shadow_subtab.py. HP is dynamic: half Syric max HP, rounded down.

_level_notes.Flicker Defense: Uses = floor(PB/2)/LR. PB5 at L13-16 = 2 uses; PB6 at L17-20 = 3 uses.
_level_notes.Reactive Link: +5 AC at L13; +8 AC at L14-16; +10 AC at L17-20. L20 adds resistance to force/necrotic/radiant/psychic while protected.
_level_notes.Nightbound Shadowcast: Cap scales from 3rd at L13 to 8th at L18+. Slot spent during preparation; released by Shadow bonus action.
_level_notes.Void Rend: 2d8 at L13; 3d8 at L14; 4d8 at L15-17; 5d8 at L18-19; 6d8 at L20. Action at L13-16; Bonus Action at L17+.
_level_notes.Oracle of the Void: 60 ft. range at L14-16; 100 ft. at L17-20. Nullifies supernatural ambushes.
_level_notes.Party Warding Shield: 2/long rest. Allies only; does not target Syric.
_level_notes.Shadowmeld: Bonus Action merge into Syric's shadow. Defensive/inactive — not Shadow Form.
_level_notes.Pre-Combat Action: One bonus action or reaction before combat begins (L14+).
_level_notes.Manifest Load: Per-level graduated values per 2026-05-31 rebuild sheet.

13.title: Shadow Level 13
13.summary: AC 15 | HP = 1/2 Syric max HP | Nightbound cap 3rd-level | Delivery 300 ft. | Shared Senses 1,000 ft. | Void Rend 2d8; Action

features.name: Shadow: Core Reference
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 15; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +5.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Umbral Predator; Large max physical size; CR 3 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 120 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +8; Con +6; Wis +7; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +11 table formula; Perception +7; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 120 ft.; Shared Senses 1,000 ft.; Spell Delivery 300 ft..
Manifest Load: Carry 75 lb.; lift/drag/push 150 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

features.name: Shadow: Shadowmeld
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Shadowmeld.

Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Party Warding.

Allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive. This does not reveal hidden creatures or bypass total cover.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding Shield
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Party Warding Shield.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Reaction: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow.
Effect: +5 AC until the end of Shadow's next turn.
Allies only; this does not target Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Syric Channeling
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Syric Channeling.

Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range (300 ft.).
Actual spells delivered or released through Shadow use Syric's spell attack bonus and spell save DC. Normal spell rules remain unless a feature modifies them.

ECHO CONDUIT
Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save. No new attack roll. No copied conditions, summons, teleportation, or ongoing zones unless a feature specifically allows it.

RUNE IMPRINT
Shadow may leave a shadow-rune on a surface within Shared Senses range (1,000 ft.). Syric may shift senses to it as a sensory anchor. Duration: 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

features.name: Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Nightbound Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Cap: 3rd-level spell.
During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action.
It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.
The stored spell follows Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and all normal spell restrictions unless another Shadow feature modifies delivery or action economy.

features.name: Shadow: Void Rend
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Void Rend.

Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.
On hit: 2d8; Action — necrotic, radiant, or force, chosen by Syric each time it hits.
Shadow does not make multiple Void Rends unless a feature specifically says so.

features.name: Shadow: Reactive Link
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Reactive Link.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Trigger: when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to make a saving throw.
Reaction: Shadow grants Syric +5 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds.
Cost: Shadow loses HP equal to twice Syric's PB. At this level, PB is +5, so the HP cost is 10.

features.name: Shadow: Flicker Defense
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Flicker Defense.

Uses: floor(PB÷2)/long rest. At this level, uses = 2.
Trigger: Shadow is hit while in Corporeal Form.
Reaction: Shadow makes a Dexterity save against the triggering attack roll.
Success: no damage and Shadow shifts to Shadow Form.
Failure: Shadow takes the damage, then shifts to Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Held Touch Spell
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Held Touch Spell.

 Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may hold one prepared touch spell and deliver it later as an action, reaction, or bonus action within range. This remains separate from Nightbound Shadowcast.

features.name: Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Limited Ranged Delivery.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Shadow may deliver one ranged spell using Shadow's action and Syric's spell slot. Max spell level follows the Nightbound Shadowcast table cap for this level (3rd-level).
Range and line of sight originate from Shadow within 300 ft..
Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

features.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

features.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
features.description:
Shadow Level 13 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

core_rules.name: Extension of Will
core_rules.text: Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.

core_rules.name: Familiar Foundation
core_rules.text: Shadow acts independently but obeys Syric. He can Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Help, Hide, Search, Use an Object, and deliver spells where features allow.

core_rules.name: Voidshape
core_rules.text: Shape change only. Shadow may look like creatures Syric/Shadow has seen, but gains no stat block, spellcasting, monster traits, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.

core_rules.name: Shadowmeld
core_rules.text: Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

core_rules.name: Umbral Shift
core_rules.text: Bonus Action: shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.

core_rules.name: Corporeal Form
core_rules.text: Can interact with objects, carry/drag within Manifest Load, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.

core_rules.name: Shadow Form
core_rules.text: Active battlefield state. Can hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in darkness/dim light/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, and deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.

core_rules.name: Syric Channeling
core_rules.text: Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range.

core_rules.name: Echo Conduit
core_rules.text: Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save, no new attack roll, and no copied conditions/summons/teleportation/ongoing zones unless a feature allows.

core_rules.name: Nightbound Shadowcast
core_rules.text: During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action. It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.

core_rules.name: Void Rend
core_rules.text: Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.

core_rules.name: False Flesh
core_rules.text: Syric may target Shadow with disguise, illusion, or body-altering spells. Shadow can mimic appearance, voice, posture, and basic behavior, but not unknown memories/passwords/skills.

core_rules.name: Lingering Presence
core_rules.text: If Shadow is destroyed, he collapses into Syric's shadow as a dormant presence after 1 minute. Shadow cannot act again until Syric completes a long rest unless a feature restores him sooner.

core_rules.name: Defensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: No. You cannot do that. I was watching from somewhere else. Defensive features require triggers, range, and uses.

core_rules.name: Offensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: You can run. You can hide. But I am not only standing here. Shadow gives Syric another angle of pressure.

core_rules.name: Rune Imprint
core_rules.text: Shadow may leave a shadow-rune that Syric can use as a sensory anchor. The rune lasts 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

core_rules.name: Shadow Step
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

core_rules.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding
core_rules.text: Shadow's awareness can guard Syric and allies against surprise when Shadow can perceive the threat. This does not grant omniscience or reveal creatures Shadow could not sense.

core_rules.name: Dimensional Echo
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

core_rules.text: If Shadow is destroyed, he collapses into Syric's shadow as a dormant presence after 1 minute. Shadow cannot act again until Syric completes a long rest unless a feature restores him sooner.

core_rules.name: Defensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: No. You cannot do that. I was watching from somewhere else. Defensive features require triggers, range, and uses.

core_rules.name: Offensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: You can run. You can hide. But I am not only standing here. Shadow gives Syric another angle of pressure.

core_rules.name: Rune Imprint

core_rules.name: Shadow Step

core_rules.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding

core_rules.name: Dimensional Echo
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

15.title: Shadow Level 15
15.summary: AC 16 | HP = 1/2 Syric max HP | Nightbound cap 5th-level | Delivery 500 ft. | Shared Senses 0.5 miles | Void Rend 4d8; Action

features.name: Shadow: Core Reference
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 16; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +5.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Living Shadowblade / Rift-Touched Conduit; Large max physical size; CR 5 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 150 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +8; Con +6; Wis +7; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +11 table formula; Perception +7; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 150 ft.; Shared Senses 0.5 miles; Spell Delivery 500 ft..
Manifest Load: Carry 90 lb.; lift/drag/push 180 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

features.name: Shadow: Shadowmeld
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Shadowmeld.

Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Party Warding.

Allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive. This does not reveal hidden creatures or bypass total cover.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding Shield
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Party Warding Shield.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Reaction: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow.
Effect: +5 AC until the end of Shadow's next turn.
Allies only; this does not target Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Syric Channeling
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Syric Channeling.

Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range (500 ft.).
Actual spells delivered or released through Shadow use Syric's spell attack bonus and spell save DC. Normal spell rules remain unless a feature modifies them.

ECHO CONDUIT
Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save. No new attack roll. No copied conditions, summons, teleportation, or ongoing zones unless a feature specifically allows it.

RUNE IMPRINT
Shadow may leave a shadow-rune on a surface within Shared Senses range (0.5 miles). Syric may shift senses to it as a sensory anchor. Duration: 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

features.name: Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Nightbound Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Cap: 5th-level spell.
During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action.
It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.
The stored spell follows Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and all normal spell restrictions unless another Shadow feature modifies delivery or action economy.

features.name: Shadow: Void Rend
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Void Rend.

Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.
On hit: 4d8; Action — necrotic, radiant, or force, chosen by Syric each time it hits.
Shadow does not make multiple Void Rends unless a feature specifically says so.

features.name: Shadow: Reactive Link
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Reactive Link.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Trigger: when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to make a saving throw.
Reaction: Shadow grants Syric +8 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds.
Cost: Shadow loses HP equal to twice Syric's PB. At this level, PB is +5, so the HP cost is 10.

features.name: Shadow: Flicker Defense
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Flicker Defense.

Uses: floor(PB÷2)/long rest. At this level, uses = 2.
Trigger: Shadow is hit while in Corporeal Form.
Reaction: Shadow makes a Dexterity save against the triggering attack roll.
Success: no damage and Shadow shifts to Shadow Form.
Failure: Shadow takes the damage, then shifts to Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Held Touch Spell
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Held Touch Spell.

 Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may hold one prepared touch spell and deliver it later as an action, reaction, or bonus action within range. This remains separate from Nightbound Shadowcast.

features.name: Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Limited Ranged Delivery.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Shadow may deliver one ranged spell using Shadow's action and Syric's spell slot. Max spell level follows the Nightbound Shadowcast table cap for this level (5th-level).
Range and line of sight originate from Shadow within 500 ft..
Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

features.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

features.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Oracle of the Void
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Oracle of the Void.

Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 60 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes and time-based surprise rounds are nullified. This prevents the ambush/surprise effect but does not automatically identify every hidden creature.

features.name: Shadow: Pre-Combat Action
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Pre-Combat Action.

Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or one reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield if an ally trigger exists, Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

features.name: Shadow: Twin Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Twin Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses Split Rune, Shadow may deliver one of the two spell targets from Shadow's position.
This changes the origin/angle of one target. It does not create a third target, second save, or second attack roll beyond what Split Rune already requires.

features.name: Shadow: Bound Beyond Death
features.description:
Shadow Level 15 Bound Beyond Death.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Trigger: when Syric dies, would drop to 0 HP, or begins his turn at 0 HP.
Effect: Shadow sacrifices all current HP and collapses into Syric. Syric returns to life or remains conscious at 1 HP + Shadow's remaining HP sacrificed, may teleport up to 60 ft. to a space Shadow can see, and Shadow is unavailable until Syric completes a long rest.
Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

16.title: Shadow Level 16
16.summary: AC 16 | HP = 1/2 Syric max HP | Nightbound cap 6th-level | Delivery 1 mile | Shared Senses 0.5 miles | Void Rend 4d8; Action

features.name: Shadow: Core Reference
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 16; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +5.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Living Shadowblade / Rift-Touched Conduit; Large max physical size; CR 5 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 150 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +8; Con +6; Wis +7; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +11 table formula; Perception +7; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 150 ft.; Shared Senses 0.5 miles; Spell Delivery 1 mile, same plane required.
Manifest Load: Carry 105 lb.; lift/drag/push 210 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

features.name: Shadow: Shadowmeld
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Shadowmeld.

Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Party Warding.

Allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive. This does not reveal hidden creatures or bypass total cover.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding Shield
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Party Warding Shield.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Reaction: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow.
Effect: +5 AC until the end of Shadow's next turn.
Allies only; this does not target Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Syric Channeling
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Syric Channeling.

Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range (1 mile, same plane required).
Actual spells delivered or released through Shadow use Syric's spell attack bonus and spell save DC. Normal spell rules remain unless a feature modifies them.

ECHO CONDUIT
Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save. No new attack roll. No copied conditions, summons, teleportation, or ongoing zones unless a feature specifically allows it.

RUNE IMPRINT
Shadow may leave a shadow-rune on a surface within Shared Senses range (0.5 miles). Syric may shift senses to it as a sensory anchor. Duration: 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

features.name: Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Nightbound Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Cap: 6th-level spell.
During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action.
It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.
The stored spell follows Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and all normal spell restrictions unless another Shadow feature modifies delivery or action economy.

features.name: Shadow: Void Rend
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Void Rend.

Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.
On hit: 4d8; Action — necrotic, radiant, or force, chosen by Syric each time it hits.
Shadow does not make multiple Void Rends unless a feature specifically says so.

features.name: Shadow: Reactive Link
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Reactive Link.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Trigger: when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to make a saving throw.
Reaction: Shadow grants Syric +8 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds.
Cost: Shadow loses HP equal to twice Syric's PB. At this level, PB is +5, so the HP cost is 10.

features.name: Shadow: Flicker Defense
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Flicker Defense.

Uses: floor(PB÷2)/long rest. At this level, uses = 2.
Trigger: Shadow is hit while in Corporeal Form.
Reaction: Shadow makes a Dexterity save against the triggering attack roll.
Success: no damage and Shadow shifts to Shadow Form.
Failure: Shadow takes the damage, then shifts to Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Held Touch Spell
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Held Touch Spell.

 Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may hold one prepared touch spell and deliver it later as an action, reaction, or bonus action within range. This remains separate from Nightbound Shadowcast.

features.name: Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Limited Ranged Delivery.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Shadow may deliver one ranged spell using Shadow's action and Syric's spell slot. Max spell level follows the Nightbound Shadowcast table cap for this level (6th-level).
Range and line of sight originate from Shadow within 1 mile, same plane required.
Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

features.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

features.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Oracle of the Void
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Oracle of the Void.

Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 60 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes and time-based surprise rounds are nullified. This prevents the ambush/surprise effect but does not automatically identify every hidden creature.

features.name: Shadow: Pre-Combat Action
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Pre-Combat Action.

Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or one reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield if an ally trigger exists, Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

features.name: Shadow: Twin Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Twin Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses Split Rune, Shadow may deliver one of the two spell targets from Shadow's position.
This changes the origin/angle of one target. It does not create a third target, second save, or second attack roll beyond what Split Rune already requires.

features.name: Shadow: Codex Surge Follow-Up
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Codex Surge Follow-Up.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric spends Codex Dice / Codex Surge, Shadow may add Void Rend damage to the same target without using an action, if Shadow can perceive or reach the target through the current link.
At this level, Void Rend is 4d8; Action.

features.name: Shadow: Bound Beyond Death
features.description:
Shadow Level 16 Bound Beyond Death.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Trigger: when Syric dies, would drop to 0 HP, or begins his turn at 0 HP.
Effect: Shadow sacrifices all current HP and collapses into Syric. Syric returns to life or remains conscious at 1 HP + Shadow's remaining HP sacrificed, may teleport up to 60 ft. to a space Shadow can see, and Shadow is unavailable until Syric completes a long rest.
Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

core_rules.name: Extension of Will
core_rules.text: Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.

core_rules.name: Familiar Foundation
core_rules.text: Shadow acts independently but obeys Syric. He can Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Help, Hide, Search, Use an Object, and deliver spells where features allow.

core_rules.name: Voidshape
core_rules.text: Shape change only. Shadow may look like creatures Syric/Shadow has seen, but gains no stat block, spellcasting, monster traits, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.

core_rules.name: Shadow Form
core_rules.text: Active battlefield state. Can hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in darkness/dim light/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, and deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.

core_rules.text: Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.

core_rules.name: False Flesh
core_rules.text: Syric may target Shadow with disguise, illusion, or body-altering spells. Shadow can mimic appearance, voice, posture, and basic behavior, but not unknown memories/passwords/skills.

core_rules.name: Lingering Presence
core_rules.text: If Shadow is destroyed, he collapses into Syric's shadow as a dormant presence after 1 minute. Shadow cannot act again until Syric completes a long rest unless a feature restores him sooner.

core_rules.name: Defensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: No. You cannot do that. I was watching from somewhere else. Defensive features require triggers, range, and uses.

core_rules.name: Offensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: You can run. You can hide. But I am not only standing here. Shadow gives Syric another angle of pressure.

core_rules.name: Rune Imprint
core_rules.text: Shadow may leave a shadow-rune that Syric can use as a sensory anchor. The rune lasts 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

core_rules.name: Shadow Step
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

core_rules.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding
core_rules.text: Shadow's awareness can guard Syric and allies against surprise when Shadow can perceive the threat. This does not grant omniscience or reveal creatures Shadow could not sense.

core_rules.name: Dimensional Echo
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

features.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

features.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Oracle of the Void
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Oracle of the Void.

Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 100 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes and time-based surprise rounds are nullified. This prevents the ambush/surprise effect but does not automatically identify every hidden creature.

features.name: Shadow: Pre-Combat Action
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Pre-Combat Action.

Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or one reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield if an ally trigger exists, Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

features.name: Shadow: Twin Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Twin Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses Split Rune, Shadow may deliver one of the two spell targets from Shadow's position.
This changes the origin/angle of one target. It does not create a third target, second save, or second attack roll beyond what Split Rune already requires.

features.name: Shadow: Codex Surge Follow-Up
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Codex Surge Follow-Up.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric spends Codex Dice / Codex Surge, Shadow may add Void Rend damage to the same target without using an action, if Shadow can perceive or reach the target through the current link.
At this level, Void Rend is 4d8; Bonus Action.

features.name: Shadow: Shared Concentration
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Shared Concentration.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric casts a concentration spell through Shadow, Shadow may hold concentration on that spell.
If Shadow takes damage, he makes the concentration save using Syric's Constitution save modifier.

features.name: Shadow: Echo Conduit Improvement
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Echo Conduit Improvement.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may pay the bonus action requirement for Echoed Rune, allowing Syric to keep Syric's own bonus action.
Echoed Rune still uses the resolved original spell outcome: no new save, no new attack roll.

features.name: Shadow: Bound Beyond Death
features.description:
Shadow Level 17 Bound Beyond Death.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Trigger: when Syric dies, would drop to 0 HP, or begins his turn at 0 HP.
Effect: Shadow sacrifices all current HP and collapses into Syric. Syric returns to life or remains conscious at 1 HP + Shadow's remaining HP sacrificed, may teleport up to 60 ft. to a space Shadow can see, and Shadow is unavailable until Syric completes a long rest.
Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

core_rules.name: Extension of Will
core_rules.text: Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.

core_rules.name: Familiar Foundation
core_rules.text: Shadow acts independently but obeys Syric. He can Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Help, Hide, Search, Use an Object, and deliver spells where features allow.

core_rules.name: Voidshape
core_rules.text: Shape change only. Shadow may look like creatures Syric/Shadow has seen, but gains no stat block, spellcasting, monster traits, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.

core_rules.name: Shadowmeld
core_rules.text: Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

core_rules.name: Umbral Shift
core_rules.text: Bonus Action: shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.

core_rules.name: Corporeal Form
core_rules.text: Can interact with objects, carry/drag within Manifest Load, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.

core_rules.name: Shadow Form
core_rules.text: Active battlefield state. Can hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in darkness/dim light/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, and deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.

core_rules.name: Syric Channeling
core_rules.text: Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range.

core_rules.name: Echo Conduit
core_rules.text: Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save, no new attack roll, and no copied conditions/summons/teleportation/ongoing zones unless a feature allows.

core_rules.name: Nightbound Shadowcast
core_rules.text: During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action. It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.

core_rules.name: Void Rend
core_rules.text: Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.

core_rules.name: False Flesh
core_rules.text: Syric may target Shadow with disguise, illusion, or body-altering spells. Shadow can mimic appearance, voice, posture, and basic behavior, but not unknown memories/passwords/skills.

core_rules.name: Lingering Presence
core_rules.text: If Shadow is destroyed, he collapses into Syric's shadow as a dormant presence after 1 minute. Shadow cannot act again until Syric completes a long rest unless a feature restores him sooner.

core_rules.name: Defensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: No. You cannot do that. I was watching from somewhere else. Defensive features require triggers, range, and uses.

core_rules.name: Offensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: You can run. You can hide. But I am not only standing here. Shadow gives Syric another angle of pressure.

core_rules.name: Rune Imprint
core_rules.text: Shadow may leave a shadow-rune that Syric can use as a sensory anchor. The rune lasts 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

core_rules.name: Shadow Step
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

core_rules.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding
core_rules.text: Shadow's awareness can guard Syric and allies against surprise when Shadow can perceive the threat. This does not grant omniscience or reveal creatures Shadow could not sense.

core_rules.name: Dimensional Echo
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Core Reference
features.description:
Shadow Level 18 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 16; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +6.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Avatar Form; Huge max physical size; CR 6 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 150 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +9; Con +7; Wis +8; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +12 table formula; Perception +8; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 150 ft.; Shared Senses Same plane; Spell Delivery 1 mile, same plane required.
Manifest Load: Carry 135 lb.; lift/drag/push 270 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

core_rules.text: No. You cannot do that. I was watching from somewhere else. Defensive features require triggers, range, and uses.

core_rules.name: Offensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: You can run. You can hide. But I am not only standing here. Shadow gives Syric another angle of pressure.

core_rules.name: Rune Imprint
core_rules.text: Shadow may leave a shadow-rune that Syric can use as a sensory anchor. The rune lasts 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

core_rules.name: Shadow Step
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

core_rules.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding
core_rules.text: Shadow's awareness can guard Syric and allies against surprise when Shadow can perceive the threat. This does not grant omniscience or reveal creatures Shadow could not sense.

core_rules.name: Dimensional Echo
core_rules.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

core_stats.name: Movement
core_stats.text: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.

core_stats.name: Darkvision

manifest_load.name: Form Strength
manifest_load.text: Manifest Load applies only to lifting, dragging, pushing, grappling, shoving, carrying, and object interaction. It does not add to attack rolls or damage.

manifest_load.name: Practical Leverage
manifest_load.text: Shadow must have a form that could physically apply the force. A shape with no leverage cannot shove or drag like a giant.

combat_features.name: Syric Channeling
combat_features.text: Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow. Syric uses his action and spell slot; range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within 1 mile, same plane required.

combat_features.name: Void Rend
combat_features.text: Melee spell attack; requires Corporeal Form; uses Syric's spell attack bonus; on hit deals 5d8 necrotic, radiant, or force. Action Economy: Bonus Action. Not a spell; cannot be Counterspelled.

combat_features.name: Nightbound Shadowcast
combat_features.text: Cap: 8th-level spell; released via Shadow's bonus action; spell stored and slot spent during long rest preparation from Syric's known wizard spells.

combat_features.name: Reactive Link

combat_features.name: Flicker Defense

combat_features.name: Oracle of the Void
combat_features.text: Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 100 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes and time-based surprise rounds are nullified.

combat_features.name: Pre-Combat Action
combat_features.text: Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield (ally trigger), Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

19.title: Shadow Level 19
19.summary: AC 17 | HP = 1/2 Syric max HP | Nightbound cap 8th-level | Delivery 1 mile | Shared Senses Same plane | Void Rend 5d8; Bonus Action

features.name: Shadow: Core Reference
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 17; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +6.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Avatar Threshold; Huge max physical size; CR 7 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 150 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +9; Con +7; Wis +8; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +12 table formula; Perception +8; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 150 ft.; Shared Senses Same plane; Spell Delivery 1 mile, same plane required.
Manifest Load: Carry 135 lb.; lift/drag/push 270 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

features.name: Shadow: Shadowmeld
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Shadowmeld.

Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Party Warding.

Allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive. This does not reveal hidden creatures or bypass total cover.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding Shield
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Party Warding Shield.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Reaction: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow.
Effect: +5 AC until the end of Shadow's next turn.
Allies only; this does not target Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Syric Channeling
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Syric Channeling.

Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range (1 mile, same plane required).
Actual spells delivered or released through Shadow use Syric's spell attack bonus and spell save DC. Normal spell rules remain unless a feature modifies them.

ECHO CONDUIT
Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save. No new attack roll. No copied conditions, summons, teleportation, or ongoing zones unless a feature specifically allows it.

RUNE IMPRINT
Shadow may leave a shadow-rune on a surface within Shared Senses range (Same plane). Syric may shift senses to it as a sensory anchor. Duration: 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

features.name: Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Nightbound Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Cap: 8th-level spell.
During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action.
It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.
The stored spell follows Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and all normal spell restrictions unless another Shadow feature modifies delivery or action economy.

features.name: Shadow: Void Rend
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Void Rend.

Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.
On hit: 5d8; Bonus Action — necrotic, radiant, or force, chosen by Syric each time it hits.
Shadow does not make multiple Void Rends unless a feature specifically says so.

features.name: Shadow: Reactive Link
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Reactive Link.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Trigger: when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to make a saving throw.
Reaction: Shadow grants Syric +10 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds.
Cost: Shadow loses HP equal to twice Syric's PB. At this level, PB is +6, so the HP cost is 12.

features.name: Shadow: Flicker Defense
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Flicker Defense.

Uses: floor(PB÷2)/long rest. At this level, uses = 3.
Trigger: Shadow is hit while in Corporeal Form.
Reaction: Shadow makes a Dexterity save against the triggering attack roll.
Success: no damage and Shadow shifts to Shadow Form. On success, Shadow may also move up to 15 ft. without provoking opportunity attacks.
Failure: Shadow takes the damage, then shifts to Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Held Touch Spell
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Held Touch Spell.

 Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may hold one prepared touch spell and deliver it later as an action, reaction, or bonus action within range. This remains separate from Nightbound Shadowcast.

features.name: Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Limited Ranged Delivery.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Shadow may deliver one ranged spell using Shadow's action and Syric's spell slot. Max spell level follows the Nightbound Shadowcast table cap for this level (8th-level).
Range and line of sight originate from Shadow within 1 mile, same plane required.
Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

features.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

features.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Oracle of the Void
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Oracle of the Void.

Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 100 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes and time-based surprise rounds are nullified. This prevents the ambush/surprise effect but does not automatically identify every hidden creature.

features.name: Shadow: Pre-Combat Action
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Pre-Combat Action.

Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or one reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield if an ally trigger exists, Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

features.name: Shadow: Twin Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Twin Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses Split Rune, Shadow may deliver one of the two spell targets from Shadow's position.
This changes the origin/angle of one target. It does not create a third target, second save, or second attack roll beyond what Split Rune already requires.

features.name: Shadow: Codex Surge Follow-Up
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Codex Surge Follow-Up.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric spends Codex Dice / Codex Surge, Shadow may add Void Rend damage to the same target without using an action, if Shadow can perceive or reach the target through the current link.
At this level, Void Rend is 5d8; Bonus Action.

features.name: Shadow: Shared Concentration
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Shared Concentration.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric casts a concentration spell through Shadow, Shadow may hold concentration on that spell.
If Shadow takes damage, he makes the concentration save using Syric's Constitution save modifier.

features.name: Shadow: Echo Conduit Improvement
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Echo Conduit Improvement.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may pay the bonus action requirement for Echoed Rune, allowing Syric to keep Syric's own bonus action.
Echoed Rune still uses the resolved original spell outcome: no new save, no new attack roll.

features.name: Shadow: Reaction Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Reaction Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may cast one stored Nightbound Shadowcast spell as a reaction when Syric is reduced below half HP, when Syric uses Deathline Reflex, or when a creature fails a saving throw against Syric's rune spell.
The stored spell cap at this level is 8th-level.

features.name: Shadow: Bound Beyond Death
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Bound Beyond Death.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Trigger: when Syric dies, would drop to 0 HP, or begins his turn at 0 HP.
Effect: Shadow sacrifices all current HP and collapses into Syric. Syric returns to life or remains conscious at 1 HP + Shadow's remaining HP sacrificed, may teleport up to 60 ft. to a space Shadow can see, and Shadow is unavailable until Syric completes a long rest.
Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

features.name: Shadow: Dual Reaction Window
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 Dual Reaction Window.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Shadow may use one Nightbound Shadowcast and one defensive reaction in the same round.
This does not grant unlimited reactions; it opens one round where the stored spell reaction and a listed defensive reaction may both happen if their triggers are valid.

features.name: Shadow: High Rune Echo Support
features.description:
Shadow Level 19 High Rune Echo Support.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses High Rune Echo, Shadow may originate the echo and extend any echoed forced movement by 5 ft.
Echoed Rune still creates no new save or attack roll beyond the original effect's resolved requirements.

combat_features.text: Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield (ally trigger), Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

combat_features.name: Shadow Step
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

combat_features.name: Lingering Presence
combat_features.text: If destroyed, Shadow returns as a dormant presence in Syric's shadow after 1 minute. Shadow cannot act or use features again until Syric completes a long rest unless a feature restores him sooner.

combat_features.name: Dimensional Echo
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

combat_features.name: Twin Shadowcast
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: when Syric uses Split Rune, Shadow may deliver one of the two spell targets from Shadow's position.

combat_features.name: Codex Surge Follow-Up
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: when Syric spends Codex Dice / Codex Surge, Shadow may add Void Rend damage (5d8) to the same target without using an action.

combat_features.name: Shared Concentration
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: when Syric casts a concentration spell through Shadow, Shadow may hold concentration. Concentration save uses Syric's CON save modifier.

combat_features.name: Reaction Shadowcast
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: Shadow may cast one stored Nightbound Shadowcast as a reaction when Syric drops below half HP, uses Deathline Reflex, or a creature fails a save against Syric's rune spell. Cap: 8th-level.

combat_features.name: Bound Beyond Death
combat_features.text: 1/long rest: when Syric dies, would drop to 0 HP, or begins his turn at 0 HP, Shadow sacrifices all current HP into Syric. Syric returns to consciousness at 1 HP + Shadow HP sacrificed and may teleport 60 ft. to a space Shadow can see. Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

combat_features.name: Dual Reaction Window
combat_features.text: 1/short rest: Shadow may use one Nightbound Shadowcast and one defensive reaction in the same round.

level_features.name: Avatar Threshold

level_features.name: AC Scaling

level_features.name: High Rune Echo Support

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Reactive Link
sentinel_of_the_void.text: 1/short rest: Reaction when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to save — Shadow grants Syric +10 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds. Shadow loses HP = 2× PB.

sentinel_of_the_void.text: 2/long rest: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow as a reaction. +5 AC until end of Shadow's next turn. Allies only.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding
sentinel_of_the_void.text: While Shadow is active and not incapacitated, allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive.

action_economy.name: Action
action_economy.text: Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Help, Hide, Search, Use an Object; touch spell delivery via Syric Channeling; Rune Imprint; Limited Ranged Delivery 2/long rest; release Held Touch if using action; release/deliver allowed spells if feature uses Shadow's action.

action_economy.name: Bonus Action
action_economy.text: Umbral Shift; Shadowmeld; Void Rend (Bonus Action at L17+); Nightbound Shadowcast release; Pre-Combat Action if a bonus action option; level-specific bonus-action features when listed.

action_economy.name: Reaction
action_economy.text: Flicker Defense; Reactive Link; Party Warding Shield (allies only); Pre-Combat Action if a reaction option; Reaction Shadowcast; Bound Beyond Death trigger; Dual Reaction Window 1/short rest.

action_economy.name: Passive
action_economy.text: Extension of Will, Two-Point Awareness, Voidshape limits, Manifest Load, Shared Senses, telepathic bond, familiar obedience, No Blind Angle / Party Warding, Lingering Presence, Oracle of the Void (L14+).

20.title: Shadow Level 20
20.summary: AC 17 | HP = 1/2 Syric max HP | Nightbound cap 8th-level | Delivery Same plane | Shared Senses Same plane | Void Rend 6d8; Bonus Action

features.name: Shadow: Core Reference
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 17; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +6.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Perfect Embodiment; Huge; Gargantuan silhouette only by DM approval max physical size; CR 8 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 180 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +9; Con +7; Wis +8; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +12 table formula; Perception +8; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 180 ft.; Shared Senses Same plane; Spell Delivery Same plane.
Manifest Load: Carry 150 lb.; lift/drag/push 300 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

features.name: Shadow: Shadowmeld
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Shadowmeld.

Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Party Warding.

Allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive. This does not reveal hidden creatures or bypass total cover.

features.name: Shadow: Party Warding Shield
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Party Warding Shield.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Reaction: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow.
Effect: +5 AC until the end of Shadow's next turn.
Allies only; this does not target Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Syric Channeling
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Syric Channeling.

Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range (Same plane).
Actual spells delivered or released through Shadow use Syric's spell attack bonus and spell save DC. Normal spell rules remain unless a feature modifies them.

ECHO CONDUIT
Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save. No new attack roll. No copied conditions, summons, teleportation, or ongoing zones unless a feature specifically allows it.

RUNE IMPRINT
Shadow may leave a shadow-rune on a surface within Shared Senses range (Same plane). Syric may shift senses to it as a sensory anchor. Duration: 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

features.name: Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Nightbound Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Cap: 8th-level spell.
During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action.
It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.
The stored spell follows Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and all normal spell restrictions unless another Shadow feature modifies delivery or action economy.

features.name: Shadow: Void Rend
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Void Rend.

Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.
On hit: 6d8; Bonus Action — necrotic, radiant, or force, chosen by Syric each time it hits.
Shadow does not make multiple Void Rends unless a feature specifically says so.

features.name: Shadow: Reactive Link
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Reactive Link.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Trigger: when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to make a saving throw.
Reaction: Shadow grants Syric +10 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds.
Cost: Shadow loses HP equal to twice Syric's PB. At this level, PB is +6, so the HP cost is 12.

features.name: Shadow: Flicker Defense
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Flicker Defense.

Uses: floor(PB÷2)/long rest. At this level, uses = 3.
Trigger: Shadow is hit while in Corporeal Form.
Reaction: Shadow makes a Dexterity save against the triggering attack roll.
Success: no damage and Shadow shifts to Shadow Form. On success, Shadow may also move up to 15 ft. without provoking opportunity attacks.
Failure: Shadow takes the damage, then shifts to Shadow Form.

features.name: Shadow: Held Touch Spell
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Held Touch Spell.

 Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may hold one prepared touch spell and deliver it later as an action, reaction, or bonus action within range. This remains separate from Nightbound Shadowcast.

features.name: Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Limited Ranged Delivery.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Shadow may deliver one ranged spell using Shadow's action and Syric's spell slot. Max spell level follows the Nightbound Shadowcast table cap for this level (8th-level).
Range and line of sight originate from Shadow within Same plane.
Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

features.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

features.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

features.name: Shadow: Oracle of the Void
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Oracle of the Void.

Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 100 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes and time-based surprise rounds are nullified. This prevents the ambush/surprise effect but does not automatically identify every hidden creature.

features.name: Shadow: Pre-Combat Action
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Pre-Combat Action.

Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or one reaction. Options include Shield through Party Warding Shield if an ally trigger exists, Help, movement, Shadow Step, Umbral Shift, or Reactive Link if triggered.

features.name: Shadow: Twin Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Twin Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses Split Rune, Shadow may deliver one of the two spell targets from Shadow's position.
This changes the origin/angle of one target. It does not create a third target, second save, or second attack roll beyond what Split Rune already requires.

features.name: Shadow: Codex Surge Follow-Up
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Codex Surge Follow-Up.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric spends Codex Dice / Codex Surge, Shadow may add Void Rend damage to the same target without using an action, if Shadow can perceive or reach the target through the current link.
At this level, Void Rend is 6d8; Bonus Action.

features.name: Shadow: Shared Concentration
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Shared Concentration.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric casts a concentration spell through Shadow, Shadow may hold concentration on that spell.
If Shadow takes damage, he makes the concentration save using Syric's Constitution save modifier.

features.name: Shadow: Echo Conduit Improvement
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Echo Conduit Improvement.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may pay the bonus action requirement for Echoed Rune, allowing Syric to keep Syric's own bonus action.
Echoed Rune still uses the resolved original spell outcome: no new save, no new attack roll.

features.name: Shadow: Reaction Shadowcast
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Reaction Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may cast one stored Nightbound Shadowcast spell as a reaction when Syric is reduced below half HP, when Syric uses Deathline Reflex, or when a creature fails a saving throw against Syric's rune spell.
The stored spell cap at this level is 8th-level.

features.name: Shadow: Bound Beyond Death
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Bound Beyond Death.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Trigger: when Syric dies, would drop to 0 HP, or begins his turn at 0 HP.
Effect: Shadow sacrifices all current HP and collapses into Syric. Syric returns to life or remains conscious at 1 HP + Shadow's remaining HP sacrificed, may teleport up to 60 ft. to a space Shadow can see, and Shadow is unavailable until Syric completes a long rest.
Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

features.name: Shadow: Dual Reaction Window
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Dual Reaction Window.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Shadow may use one Nightbound Shadowcast and one defensive reaction in the same round.
This does not grant unlimited reactions; it opens one round where the stored spell reaction and a listed defensive reaction may both happen if their triggers are valid.

features.name: Shadow: High Rune Echo Support
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 High Rune Echo Support.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric uses High Rune Echo, Shadow may originate the echo and extend any echoed forced movement by 5 ft.
Echoed Rune still creates no new save or attack roll beyond the original effect's resolved requirements.

features.name: Shadow: Perfect Embodiment
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Perfect Embodiment.

Shadow may remain physically manifested indefinitely unless destroyed, dismissed, suppressed, or returned to Syric's shadow. Shadow keeps its own HP, stats, and limits regardless of assumed shape.

features.name: Shadow: Dual Spell Turn
features.description:
Shadow Level 20 Dual Spell Turn.

Uses: 1/long rest.
When Syric casts an inscribed rune spell of 5th level or lower, Shadow may cast the same spell of 5th level or lower as a bonus action on the same turn if the spell is valid through Shadow.
This is Syric's magic echoed through Shadow. It uses Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and normal spell rules unless another feature modifies delivery.

core_rules.name: False Flesh
core_rules.text: Syric may target Shadow with disguise, illusion, or body-altering spells. Shadow can mimic appearance, voice, posture, and basic behavior, but not unknown memories/passwords/skills.

core_rules.name: Lingering Presence
core_rules.text: If Shadow is destroyed, he collapses into Syric's shadow as a dormant presence after 1 minute. Shadow cannot act again until Syric completes a long rest unless a feature restores him sooner.

core_rules.name: Defensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: No. You cannot do that. I was watching from somewhere else. Defensive features require triggers, range, and uses.

core_rules.name: Offensive Doctrine
core_rules.text: You can run. You can hide. But I am not only standing here. Shadow gives Syric another angle of pressure.

core_rules.name: Rune Imprint
core_rules.text: Shadow may leave a shadow-rune that Syric can use as a sensory anchor. The rune lasts 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

core_rules.name: Dimensional Echo

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Flicker Defense
sentinel_of_the_void.text: Reaction when hit in Corporeal Form; Dex save vs attack roll. Success: no damage and shifts to Shadow Form. On success, Shadow may also move up to 15 ft. without provoking opportunity attacks. Failure: takes damage, then shifts. Uses = floor(PB÷2)/LR.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Party Warding Shield
sentinel_of_the_void.text: 2/long rest: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow as a reaction. +5 AC until end of Shadow's next turn. Allies only.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: No Blind Angle / Party Warding
sentinel_of_the_void.text: While Shadow is active and not incapacitated, allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Oracle of the Void
sentinel_of_the_void.text: Shadow grants perfect foresight to Syric and all allies within 100 ft. of Shadow. Supernatural ambushes nullified.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Pre-Combat Action
sentinel_of_the_void.text: Before combat begins, Shadow may take one bonus action or reaction.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Bound Beyond Death
sentinel_of_the_void.text: 1/long rest: when Syric dies or would drop to 0 HP, Shadow sacrifices all HP into Syric. Syric returns at 1 HP + Shadow HP sacrificed. Cannot trigger if Shadow has 0 HP.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Reaction Shadowcast
sentinel_of_the_void.text: 1/long rest: Shadow casts stored Nightbound Shadowcast as a reaction on key triggers. Cap: 8th-level.

sentinel_of_the_void.name: Dual Reaction Window
sentinel_of_the_void.text: 1/short rest: Shadow may use one Nightbound Shadowcast and one defensive reaction in the same round.

action_economy.name: Action
action_economy.text: Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Help, Hide, Search, Use an Object; touch spell delivery via Syric Channeling; Rune Imprint; Limited Ranged Delivery 2/long rest; release Held Touch if using action; release/deliver allowed spells if feature uses Shadow's action.

action_economy.name: Bonus Action
action_economy.text: Umbral Shift; Shadowmeld; Void Rend (Bonus Action at L17+); Nightbound Shadowcast release; Pre-Combat Action if a bonus action option; level-specific bonus-action features when listed.

action_economy.name: Reaction
action_economy.text: Flicker Defense; Reactive Link; Party Warding Shield (allies only); Pre-Combat Action if a reaction option; Reaction Shadowcast; Bound Beyond Death trigger; Dual Reaction Window 1/short rest.

action_economy.name: Passive
action_economy.text: Extension of Will, Two-Point Awareness, Voidshape limits, Manifest Load, Shared Senses, telepathic bond, familiar obedience, No Blind Angle / Party Warding, Lingering Presence, Oracle of the Void (L14+).

action_economy.name: Out of Combat
action_economy.text: Scouting, Help, object interaction, disguise/impersonation through False Flesh, carrying within Manifest Load, Rune/Shadow positioning as allowed by active features. Rune Imprint, Shadow Step, Dimensional Echo.
